title: Extra Craft
description: This mod adds tons of new items, structures, and food to the game to enchance it more!
body:
Welcome to **Extra Craft**, the mod that adds new items and tools from the caves and above! You can find new ores, make and craft new tools, find more food, and much more! This is made to expand the game and make it feel more better. Much more will be added to the mod as updates come through, hope you enjoy using it and thanks for downloading.


![Ruby Axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bf91aa07d24d106bb419e1bf24660d5e17efb52_0.webp)


There are no API's or mods needed to help with the mod working.

Currently the mod only supports CurseForge 1.20.1, ill find a way to make it support fabric and other minecraft versions soon!
